name: Braise-Errante
description: Éclaireur aérien sismique dont les membranes de roche feuilletée captent les ondes telluriques. Rapide pour sa taille, il cartographie les failles pour guider les émergences des plus grands titans.
prompt: Dark sci-fi fantasy, epic scale. A flying creature made of thin layered volcanic rock membranes stretched like wings, with a streamlined obsidian body. Glowing magma veins pulse through its translucent stone wings. Multiple pupilless eyes scan the landscape below. It hovers over a cracked wasteland, leaving trails of ash and embers. Smaller and more agile than other titans. Dramatic sky, highly detailed.
